programme.title: E1 - Falonda Simpson And Davonda Washington
programme.desc: A quiet Mississippi summer night is shattered by a 911 call reporting a brutal double murder—but as investigators dig deeper, the grieving husband who found the bodies becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: E6 - Kids Who Kill - Kim Edwards & Lucas Markham
programme.desc: Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were both outsiders from troubled homes. They felt they understood each other when no one else did. Together they made a plan to get rid of the mum and sister Kim resented.

programme.title: E108 - Friends And Enemies
programme.desc: When three people are gunned down in a Tulsa home, detectives face two suspects, and a web of lies. Prosecutors are left with circumstantial evidence to clinch the case against a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: E116 - Murder On Maiden Lane
programme.desc: In Atlanta, when a young father is gunned down, a rookie homicide detective draws from her own experience losing a family member to murder to track down his killers.

programme.title: E7 - Neighbor Killer Or Family Defender?
programme.desc: When a veteran and his young family are confronted by an angry neighbour, harsh words escalate to a fatal shooting. Is the accused an enraged murderer or a family defender?

programme.title: E5 - Staircase Shooter Or Defensive Dad?
programme.desc: An angry confrontation leads to a 31-year-old father facing life behind bars after shooting his ex-girlfriend's boyfriend in the leg. He insists he was defending his ex and their child from an intruder.

programme.title: E1 - Bangkok
programme.desc: Jack explores the relationship between pork and apples. Then, he hits the streets of Bangkok, and he adds an Asian twist to the British classic pork bun and apple sauce.

programme.title: E6 - Wildfire
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a devastating bushfire season, Zac and Darin learn about efforts to rehabilitate the wildlife and livestock population.

programme.title: E5 - Gentlemen Start Your Engines
programme.desc: As Chris and Billy psych up for the big challenge race, Billy’s mechanical issues force a hilarious change in plans. And losing the challenge gives the term “Drag Strip” a whole new meaning.

programme.title: E4 - Staff Training
programme.desc: The Wine Rack kitchen is operational and finally Sarah is able to begin training the staff. With a completely new menu there’s a lot to learn and very little time. Meanwhile, Sarah explores the sweeter side of Mumbai’s food offerings.

programme.title: E3 - Just-Terry-Fied
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be test 2 scenes from Justified where, Terry, aka Raylan Givins finds himself in a bathtub and a dead body lying over top of him. A woman stands near ready to end his life when Raylan shoots his service revolver through the dead body and into the woman killing her. Terry and Larry will also test to see if they can incapacitate a bad guy by shooting the steering wheel of the car to activate the airbag.

programme.title: E4 - Terry's Reindeer Game
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from Reindeer Games when Ben Affleck and Charlize Theron get trapped under a frozen lake, and they escape by shooting 3 shots with a 12-gauge shot gun underwater to blast a hole in the ice to escape.

programme.title: E2 - 102
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet our house hunters Ella and Sa who are searching for a million dollar property in the bay side of Melbourne

programme.title: E2 - An Airplane's 2nd Life
programme.desc: A passenger aircraft is stripped down. But the aircraft is not decommissioned - it is given a special conversion and begins a second life as a cargo jet. In just a few months, 600 men and women transform a passenger jet into a long-haul cargo plane - a masterpiece of aeronautical engineering! During the conversion, they give the old aircraft up to 30 percent more storage space and reduce fuel consumption per tonne of payload by 20 percent. Various parts have to be converted or removed and replaced - there is a lot to do.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.desc: Highlights from the latest PGA TOUR tournament.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Matt Damon reprises his most iconic role in the latest chapter of the Bourne franchise.

programme.title: E212 - iMeet Fred
programme.desc: Freddie says on the air that he is not a fan of internet sensation Fred, causing Fred to announce the end of his videos forever. Fans are infuriated that Freddie has caused an end to the popular videos.

programme.title: E213 - iLook Alike
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they’re still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: E101 - Cactus Sitting / Disaster of Hole 2
programme.desc: The twins take a cactus called Pricklebutt to the beach and end up mounting a dramatic search and rescue mission. // Best and Bester won't let Grumpy Pants' round of golf stop them from catching the finale of their favourite show.

programme.title: E312 - Get Ouch / Day of the Living Dad Jokes
programme.desc: After getting rid of Ouchie, Pinkeye takes over the Star house. // Patrick and Squidina must find safety amidst the dad joke apocalypse.

programme.title: E117 - Twin It to Win It
programme.desc: Captain Man makes twin superheroes, ShoutOut and AWOL, compete over who can catch more criminals using their own ways of crime-fighting.

programme.title: E298 - Pet the Rock
programme.desc: Patrick's new pet rock catches the eye of a mischievous rock collector.

programme.title: E410 - A Grave Mistake / Leader of the Rack
programme.desc: Lucy faces off against her friend Haiku to become the new president of the Young Morticians' Club at school. // Leni is promoted to temporary manager at work, but she worries about remaining good friends with Miguel and Fiona.

programme.title: E108 - The Space Rock
programme.desc: Trouble follows Henry home from his superhero life when a piece of rock from outer space turns out to be more than it seems.

programme.title: E299 - Tango Tangle
programme.desc: Plankton and Karen take dance lessons and quickly become the top of the class.

programme.title: E106 - Sound of Silence / Space Invader
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. // After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!

programme.title: E210 - Life Insurance / Burst Your Bubble
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger! // When SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town wants one! Everyone except Mrs. Puff, that is.

programme.title: E106 - Gas Station Vacation / Bunny the Barbarian
programme.desc: The Star Family heads to their favorite resort. // Bunny goes on a mid-day adventure to a forgotten age.

programme.title: E105 - Project Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln has to get to school on time but getting his sisters out the door proves to be the biggest obstacle of all.

programme.desc: Morihito, Kanshi, Keigo, and Miharu wake in a room with masks, forced by Zigzag into a deadly game to save Nico.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 2
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 2

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: Under Nobunaga's orders, Koichiro is told to marry Chika (Yoshioka Riho), the daughter of Morinari. Tokichiro celebrates the match, but troubling rumors surround Chika, and she secretly carries deep resentment toward the Oda clan. Meanwhile, Nobunaga decides to wage war against the Asakura and tells Nagamasa he need only guard the rear, since his son is being held as a hostage in Asakura territory. However, once the battle begins, Nagamasa's father, Hisamasa, pressures him to side with the Asakura

programme.title: Rokkaku Seiji's Nomitetsu Railroad Trip: Sangi Railway, Kintetsu Railway & Yokkaichi Asunarou Railway
programme.desc: Actor Rokkaku Seiji, a lover of both trains and good drinks, sets out on a rail journey around the world. At each stop, he wanders through the towns and explores whatever catches his eye. Sit back and enjoy this fun-filled railroad trip, accompanied by the music he personally selects!

programme.title: Solo Trip To Hot Springs 'Hokkaido'
programme.desc: Even if you were able to travel, it would often be a rushed trip with limited time... For you, this program is like a solo trip to hot spring resorts, allowing you to fully relax and experience the best of destinations!

programme.title: NHK News 7
programme.desc: NHK's core news program wrapping up the day's events in an easy to understand way.

programme.title: Strolling With Tamori
programme.desc: Comedian Tamori takes you on a tour across the country to offer a glimpse of history hidden in modern scenes.

programme.title: Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings 'The Grounding Of Kaiwomaru'
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the “Lost Era” following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

The new series focuses on people in the “Lost Era” following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

programme.title: Geo Japan 'Nanki Kumano'
programme.desc: Japan's natural beauty is astonishing in its richness - from the sea to the mountains, from deep valleys to tranquil lakes. How were the breathtaking landscapes that captivate us created? Now, it's time to set out on a journey to uncover the secrets hidden deep within the earth.

programme.title: The Great Nature 'Southern Africa'

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: When Nobunaga learns that Nagamasa has defected to the Asakura side, he flies into a rage. However, thanks to Tokichiro's quick thinking, he regains his composure and decides to retreat. Tokichiro serves as the rear guard, while Koichiro takes on the most dangerous role in the retreat. Thus begins a desperate withdrawal fought by the two brothers. Meanwhile in Kyoto, Yoshiaki (Onoe Ukon), having learned of Nagamasa's betrayal, reaches a grave decision of his own.

programme.title: E1 - Episode 1
programme.desc: It is election night in November 1960 and the entire Kennedy family is gathered at Hyannis Port. Victory for John Kennedy is secured by the narrowest margin in history.

programme.title: E2 - Poppy's By The Tree - Part 1
programme.desc: When it’s time for the annual Bundy vacation, Al vetoes Hawaii in favor of scenic Dumpwater, Florida, only to discover that there is a tourist-bating ax-murderer on the loose.

programme.title: E3 - Poppy's By The Tree - Part 2
programme.desc: When a tourist-hating ax-murderer kidnaps Peggy, it puts a slight damper on the family fun and almost-for-certain confirms that the Bundys will probably never vacation in Dumpwater, Florida again.

programme.title: E6 - Girls Just Wanna Have Fun - Part 1
programme.desc: When Peggy, Marcy and the neighborhood girls drop in on a male strip joint, Marcy loses more than her innocence.

programme.title: Trip to Vietnam
programme.desc: Zoe has made some delicious cupcakes and invites Milo and Alim to try them out. Zoe is surprised to see the hamster eating on the floor instead of on the table. Well, in Vietnam, eating on the floor is not something unusual.

programme.title: Trip to Iceland
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing a game that uses family names. Alim joins them, but it turns out that he doesn't have a surname. And he is far from being the only one. Our heroes will probably understand this better if they visit Alim's penfriend Gunnar in Iceland.

programme.title: The Not So Fishy Mystery
programme.desc: When the fish in the local pond all seem to disappear, Addison and Tess fear that they ended up as fish sticks in the school cafeteria's lunch special and set out to solve the mystery

programme.title: The Mystery of the Lucha Grandma
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are afraid that Mrs. Rorschach is being secretly intimidated by a shadowy pro wrestler named the Lucha Grandma and are determined to find out her identity and put a stop to her antics.

programme.title: Shoe
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko reuse shoes to make some cute DIYs

programme.title: Flower Power
programme.desc: Albert eats a flower that gives him super powers, and he uses them to take revenge on the kids who have tormented him throughout his life. But with great power comes great irresponsibility...

programme.title: An A-mazing Winter Adventure
programme.desc: The kids must find their way out of Yoko's magical snow labyrinth in order to get to Ranger Loops' puppet show on time!

programme.title: Facing Fears
programme.desc: One of the Junior Vets must confront his fear of goats, there's an emergency during surgery on a pet rabbit, and thirty-two thousand patients are waiting at a farm.

programme.title: The Magician (Steven Frayne) and The Captain (Kate Richardson-Walsh)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the 'Undisputed King of Magic' Steven Frayne (aka Dynamo) and Olympic gold medallist hockey captain Kate Richardson-Walsh share their insights on success.

programme.title: Secret Message!
programme.desc: Eric learns that, with a little science, you can bring out all the colours that make up the black ink in felt tip markers. He separates the colours using chromatography. This gives him a way to write secret messages.

programme.title: Squidgy Stomach
programme.desc: In this episode, the doctors use a camera pill to reveal how your stomach squidges your food during digestion and get ready to rummage in your fruit bowl, as Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand show you how to make a fake stomach in today's experiment.

programme.title: A Magic Curve Ball
programme.desc: In so called ‘string art', straight lines are drawn that look like curved lines. In this episode, Eric tries to do the same. What mathematical principles form the basis of string art and will Eric succeed?

programme.title: Snot, Snot, Snot!
programme.desc: There's a MEGA-SNOTTING in Ouchology, while in the lab, the doctors use a giant crushing machine to test the strength of your teeth!

programme.title: The Great Garden Disaster
programme.desc: When Heni leaves Newts to take care of her garden for a week, Darwin and Newts have to figure out why some of the plants aren't growing so well.

programme.title: The Bake Mistake
programme.desc: In a fierce cooking competition, Darwin and Newts learn about the importance of yeast in order to make things rise.

programme.title: Electromagnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an electromagnet using a nail, a battery and some electrical wire. The electricity passing through the wire creates an invisible force called a magnetic field, making the nail work like a magnet. He uses it to pick up paper clips from the table.

programme.title: An A-mazing Winter Adventure

programme.title: Shoe

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Day of the Dream
programme.desc: Ricky is having weird dreams and makes surreal art, including giant hands and a burger hat inspired by Rene Magritte. After scoffing some cheesy snacks, Ricky gets his pajamas on to create illuminating dream art.

programme.title: Yoko's Computer Game
programme.desc: Yoko gets the kids to appreciate nature by tricking them into thinking the park is actually a computer game!

programme.title: Eric, The Map, and the Compass
programme.desc: Eric learns how a compass works and makes one using a needle. He discovers that because of the iron at the centre of the Earth and the way the Earth spins, the magnetic field around our planet acts like a giant magnet.

programme.title: Admirable Admiral
programme.desc: Eric learns that even if something is made from a material that is denser or heavier than water, it will float if it has the right shape. He makes a paper boat strong enough to carry toy cars without sinking.

programme.title: Life-Changing Operation
programme.desc: Just when Jamie thought he'd conquered his fear of goats, he's sent to the Highlands to track down and treat a giant mountain goat that needs its hooves trimmed. And there's a life-changing operation for a border collie, Joke.

programme.title: E7 - Fast Slow Bungalow
programme.desc: Flamingo and John give Sarah and Duck a tour of their home and invite them to play a game.

programme.title: E3 - The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E3 - Explorer
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing as they go exploring.

programme.title: E19 - A Night At The Circuits
programme.desc: Messy is exploring science questions. He joins his friends in OKIDO on an adventure. They explore the electrical world of circuits to fix Zoe's communicator.

programme.title: E28 - Wool On Wheels
programme.desc: Scarf Lady is holding a 'knitted treats' sale in the park, but the weather is causing a problem...

programme.title: E2 - Chucklesome Trucks
programme.desc: When Rebecca works with the Troublesome Trucks, everyone expects the worst, but she defies everyone's expectations and has a very amusing day.

programme.title: E19 - The Claw
programme.desc: When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.title: E20 - Markets
programme.desc: When Bluey visits the markets with five bucks from the tooth fairy, the options are endless. But as she and Indy look for the perfect purchase, spending it proves hard.

programme.title: E6 - The Library Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels can't figure out if fish have noses, Duggee shows them his library. But when the Squirrels realise no-one is visiting it, they have an idea...

programme.title: E7 - Tag's First Day
programme.desc: The Squirrels are crafting in the Clubhouse when Betty saves Tag from throwing water across the table instead of glitter.

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E11 - Harbin Ice City, China
programme.desc: GrimHQ overheats so lands in Harbin Ice City, melting the amazing ice sculptures.

programme.title: E7 - Favourite Thing
programme.desc: When Bluey accidentally makes Bingo upset playing a game at dinner, she will do anything to make her happy again - even changing the rules of the game. But nothing seems to work.

programme.title: E8 - Daddy Dropoff
programme.desc: Dad refuses to be late dropping off Bluey and Bingo at kindy and school, but the girls make Dad play so many games, they quickly derail his plan.

programme.title: E4 - Hui Gumm Yaadein
programme.desc: Dr. Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Last Night Ever
programme.desc: In this episode, “Night King” Dayo Wong and Director Jack Ng reveal their personal experiences in nightclubs. While Dayo shares his 'bitterness' of being surrounded by the ladies and unveils the intricate storylines in the film, they also discuss about the differences between “Night King” and previous nightclub movies, allowing everyone to appreciate the film from various perspectives.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E259 -Dongji Rescue
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Wine War
programme.desc: Shui Zhang and Waley were buddies at an orphanage. Adopted by a French couple and moved to France at a young age, Waley has become a wine connoisseur prodigy. Left alone in China, Shui Zhang grows up to be a braggart and a nobody. When Shui Zhang travels to France one day to enlist Waley's help in auctioning a bottle of red wine called 'The God of Wine,' said to contain Kublai Khan's secret wine-brewing recipe, Waley accepted the challenge in a heartbeat. During the auction, Waley encounters a representative from the seller, the beautiful Yvonne, and falls in love with her at first sight. The other potential buyer is the wealthy and imposing coal tycoon Changfang Fang. While he appears to be a rich and vulgar brute on the surface, he is much more than meets the eyes. Adding to the mystery is the private connoisseur of suspicious origins following Fang everywhere. To Waley's surprise, Zhang and Fang seem to be sharing secrets between themselves. programme.title: GMA Pinoy Blockbuster: 'Anino Ng Araw'
programme.desc: Fredo (FPJ), a humble man seeking safe haven for his family, flees far into the remote country-side in order to escape the vindictiveness of his crime-lord father-in-law, after wounding his honor by playing part in the death of his first-born son. But no matter where they go, they cannot outrun his desire for revenge. When they are finally found out, FPJ must fight against overwhelming odds to save his wife and newborn child whose fate hangs in the balance.

E6 - Amazon Monkeys
programme.desc: Get an inside look at the Pantanal’s most extraordinary primate families. Check out the ear-splitting cries of howler monkeys, the fearless leaps of curious saki monkeys, and the agile tails of highly intelligent white-whiskered spider monkeys.

programme.title: E10 - The Pantanal
programme.desc: The Pantanal experiences extreme climatic shifts, from brutal droughts during the searingly hot dry season to floods created by rainy-season tempests. See how the region’s diverse animal population works to coexist and ensure collective survival.

programme.title: E2 - Asia's Longest Day
programme.desc: See how creatures from the Tibetan plateau, to the lush rainforests of Thailand, to Vietnam’s twisted mangroves, survive four extra hours of daylight once a year, searching for food, fighting for dominance and raising their families.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E5 - Pacific Islands: Commotion in the Ocean
programme.desc: Live through a sunny tropical September day with creatures from Polynesia to the Indonesian archipelago. See how the sun affects the movement, feeding habits, and mating rituals of everything from tiny zooplankton to whale sharks.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E2 - Asia's Longest Day
programme.desc: See how creatures from the Tibetan plateau, to the lush rainforests of Thailand, to Vietnam’s twisted mangroves, survive four extra hours of daylight once a year, searching for food, fighting for dominance and raising their families.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas

programme.title: E5 - Pacific Islands: Commotion in the Ocean

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever

programme.title: E2 - Save the Giants
programme.desc: The wild coastline of Mozambique stretches along more than 1,600 miles - an area teeming with a diversity of marine life. Some of the world’s largest filter feeders are attracted to this nutrient-rich water. But even these large creatures are defenceless against reckless overfishing. Two of Mozambique’s leading marine researchers, Andrea Marshall and Nakia Cullain, set out to find one of the ocean’s most secretive animals and protect its most well known, before its too late.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !:2025-2026
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: E18 - Farewell Horrible Dinner
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E4 - Storm
programme.desc: Dounia and her grandparents are gradually getting to know Canada, their new country. But for little Dounia, it isn't easy to get used to its seasons, food and language. She misses her father terribly. Fortunately her new friends rally round to help her make progress.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo:2025-2026
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: E3 - Clementine De Chabaneix/Nathalie And Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: 2 Ou 3 Choses Que Je NE Sais Pas D'elle
programme.desc: At 18, Lila has decided to wear the Muslim headscarf, much to the dismay of her family who have gathered to celebrate Eid. But, after an argument with her boyfriend she is in a resolutely bad mood and decides to slip away.

programme.title: E23 - Forests: The New Green Gold Of Occitanie
programme.desc: The timber industry is a fast-growing sector; the forest is a natural resource that attracts investors. But by seeking to make it profitable, do we risk altering it? How can we turn it into wealth without sacrificing it?

programme.title: E3 - Clementine De Chabaneix/Nathalie And Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: E24 - Giant Octopus
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E39
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 《愛很美味》講述了三位個性迥異、特色鮮明的都市麗人，在經歷了一系列創業的艱辛，職場的壓迫，和感情的波折後，對生活、事業和愛情都有了重新的認識。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 《膽小鬼》電視劇是由檸萌影業、優酷聯合出品，鄭執編劇，張曉波執導，歐豪、王硯輝領銜主演，王玉雯、周依然、侯雯元主演的青春懸疑犯罪短劇集。該劇改編自鄭執的長篇小說《生吞》，該劇講述了一段四個少年的青春往事，多年後一樁重現的罪案，讓所有人不得不面對人性最真實的「黑白戰爭」。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: A duck dish and two sides were featured on the last first-class dinner menu served on the ''Titanic'' in April 1912. The participants must try to recreate it.

programme.title: E10 - Gregoire Wolinski/Sponge Cities/Chatelaison Gardens
programme.desc: Contents: Gregoire Wolinski, world aquascaping champion; the end of soil artificialisation thanks to sponge towns; Manoir de Chatelaison gardens; Don't panic with Caroline and Alexandre.

programme.title: E4 - Exploring Western Canada
programme.desc: In Revelstoke, Alexis and Thomas discover slackcountry skiing, a hybrid between resort and backcountry skiing. Though seemingly more accessible, slackcountry carries the same avalanche and rescue risks.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: A duck dish and two sides were featured on the last first-class dinner menu served on the ''Titanic'' in April 1912. The participants must try to recreate it.

programme.title: E10 - Gregoire Wolinski/Sponge Cities/Chatelaison Gardens
programme.desc: Contents: Gregoire Wolinski, world aquascaping champion; the end of soil artificialisation thanks to sponge towns; Manoir de Chatelaison gardens; Don't panic with Caroline and Alexandre.

programme.title: E4 - Exploring Western Canada
programme.desc: In Revelstoke, Alexis and Thomas discover slackcountry skiing, a hybrid between resort and backcountry skiing. Though seemingly more accessible, slackcountry carries the same avalanche and rescue risks.

programme.title: E11 - With Fanny Jandrain
programme.desc: On the menu: warm salad of skate wings with red beans and a chicken and mozzarella cordon bleu.

programme.title: E11 - In Dinard, With Caroline De Benoist
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is in Dinard with designer Caroline de Benoist. On today's menu: skate wing with cider and apple.

programme.title: E5 - Luxe De Poche/Selva Negra/Nathalie Seiller Dejean
programme.desc: An exhibition called ''Luxe de poche'' (''Pocket Luxury'') reveals the refined accessories of the 18th century, reflecting the habits and customs of the time. The famous traditional Black Forest cake drew its name from a German region. Nathalie Seiller Dejean transforms straw into a treasure trove of refinement. How to wear bootcut trousers.

programme.title: E3 - Savoie: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Whether summer or winter, Savoie is always a land of excellence. We meet Fombonne-Rouvier, town planner; Rene and Maxime Meilleur, chefs at a three Michelin-starred restaurant; Klebert Silvestre, bee-keeper, Nicolas Mathieu, crozet-producer and mountain guide; Pascale Vidonne, in charge of heritage in Bourg-Saint-Maurice, notably responsible for its Baroque chapels.

programme.title: E11 - Stephane Rolland
programme.desc: As a tribute to Maria Callas, filmed by Claude Lelouch at the Opera, Stephane Rolland's show recreates the atmosphere of a 1950s gala evening. An autumn-winter 2023-2024 haute couture collection which focuses on the graphical aspects, the structure and black and white.

programme.title: E350
programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. programme.title: E22
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E210 - Easter Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry are collecting Easter eggs, Quacker hatches from one of the eggs and runs away from Tom. Jerry helps Quacker escape. Tom falls into the pond, Quacker and Jerry save Tom. They all share Easter basket treats in the end.

programme.title: E150 - The Candidate/The Anybody
programme.desc: When their parents all go to a charity gala at the school, the kids are locked in a classroom with a VHS tape. However, when the room starts to heat up, they need a leader to get them out of the situation and have to choose between Anais, a qualified but unpopular candidate or Gumball, a charismatic candidate with absolutely no plans.

programme.title: E210 - Easter Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry are collecting Easter eggs, Quacker hatches from one of the eggs and runs away from Tom. Jerry helps Quacker escape. Tom falls into the pond, Quacker and Jerry save Tom. They all share Easter basket treats in the end.

programme.title: E74 - The Romantic/The Uploads/The Wicked/The Origins - Pt 1/The Origins - Pt 2
programme.desc: After Gumball convinces himself that Penny doesn't love him as much as she used to, he decides to put together a romantic quest to remind her of all the good times they've had together. But Gumball's romantic gesture backfires, landing Penny - and maybe their relationship - in serious peril.

programme.title: E157 - Shrimps And Prime Rib/Halloween V Christmas
programme.desc: The Titans try to remember how to be superheroes in order to stop The Brain.

programme.title: E2 - Just Set Up The Chairs/Over The Top/Trucker Hall Of Fame/Sandwich Of Death/Portable T
programme.desc: While preparing for a birthday party, Mordecai and Rigby are assigned to set up chairs. They try to prove to Benson they are not slackers, but fail.

programme.title: E338 - Earthquake-Proof Bear/The Spirit Of Competition/Odd-Job Crab/Ordeal Of Comfort/Outboa
programme.desc: The Lemmings discover that several drops of Tabasco sauce poured into a rock fault releases powerful sprays of steam that propel them high into the sky on a pot lid.

programme.title: E404 - Robinput/Soccer Punch/In The Gut & Reverse
programme.desc: Lamput and the Docs re-enact the classic folktale – Robinhood with their own unique twist!

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: E15 - 喜迎收官 出發團合唱
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 以美食出發，傳遞家鄉的味道，用最質樸的方式製作美食，給海外遊子送去家人的慰藉，傳遞濃濃的思鄉之情。

programme.title: E8 - 賽車約會 盯妻狂魔
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E15 - 喜迎收官 出發團合唱
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: Troublesome Night 4
programme.desc: Leonardo, DiCaprio and Driver joined a bargain tour to Philippines, hoping that they could feast all they could on the local girls as well as those traveling with them. They were excited to see that two wantons, U2 and K2 had joined their tour with a pretty tour guide Yan. They thought they would enjoy themselves, but in fact, they were heading for their death...

programme.title: Final Run
programme.desc: MA and KAU were the Senior Inspectors of Narcotics Bureau. They were smuggling with the Golden Triangle in Thailand. CHEUNG – an officer of Custom Department. CHEUNG and MA were good friend since they studied in the University. MA's group wanted to get more help in custom, he asked CHEUNG to be his partner, but CHEUNG refused. While KAU was very hasty, he killed all CHEUNG's family. Then, CHEUNG wanted to take revenge against them. However, MA and KAU made a plan to get CHEUNG into trouble. At last, CHEUNG escaped to Thailand and stayed at his aunt's house. MA and KAU knew that CHEUNG escaped to Thailand, so they tried their best to kill him, but they did not succeed...

programme.title: Secrets Of A Gold Digger Killer
programme.desc: When Celeste Beard's multimillionaire husband was killed by her delusional and disturbed friend Tracey, Celeste was certain she would never be blamed. But Celeste's twin daughters discovered the truth and works to bring her to justice.

programme.title: Spy Kids: All The Time In The World
programme.desc: The action packed franchise is back...with the next generation of Spy Kids!

programme.title: Secrets Of A Gold Digger Killer
programme.desc: When Celeste Beard's multimillionaire husband was killed by her delusional and disturbed friend Tracey, Celeste was certain she would never be blamed. But Celeste's twin daughters discovered the truth and works to bring her to justice.

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E7 - Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a messy guest, a cracked egg, a hoppy friend & a ruined teddy! Jeff meets a cute but very messy Floofer & has to learn to live with his new friend's untidy habits. Then, Lulu finds a colorful egg, & when it cracks, a cute chick hatches that she doesn't want to let go! The challenges continue as Newt tries to nurse an injured Oddfrog back to health & Pogo feels guilty after accidentally ruining Newt's teddy bear-shaped hedge.

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.
